task_completion.description: Import the NACA 4412 airfoil into QBlade
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade interface showing 'NACA 4412' in the airfoil list or the loaded airfoil profile in the main view.

task_completion.description: Perform XFoil viscous analysis for Reynolds number 200,000
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade's XFoil Direct Analysis module showing a polar definition or graph with Re = 200,000 (or 2e5) and an Angle of Attack (AoA) range from -5 to 15 degrees.

task_completion.description: Perform XFoil viscous analysis for Reynolds number 500,000
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade's XFoil Direct Analysis module showing a polar definition or graph with Re = 500,000 (or 5e5) and an Angle of Attack (AoA) range from -5 to 15 degrees.

task_completion.description: Perform XFoil viscous analysis for Reynolds number 1,000,000
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade's XFoil Direct Analysis module showing a polar definition or graph with Re = 1,000,000 (or 1e6) and an Angle of Attack (AoA) range from -5 to 15 degrees.

task_completion.description: Export the polar dataset for Re = 200,000
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog in QBlade exporting to 'polar_re200k.txt', or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists in /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/.

task_completion.description: Export the polar dataset for Re = 500,000
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog in QBlade exporting to 'polar_re500k.txt', or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists in /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/.

task_completion.description: Export the polar dataset for Re = 1,000,000
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog in QBlade exporting to 'polar_re1m.txt', or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists in /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the QBlade GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the QBlade application open and being actively used (clicking menus, entering values), rather than just running terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the XFoil analysis in QBlade
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of generated polar curves (graphs) in the QBlade interface corresponding to the three Reynolds numbers, proving the simulation was run and not just empty files created.

integrity.description: The agent exported the files directly from QBlade
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Export' or 'Save' dialog from within QBlade is visible, saving the polar data to the requested text files, rather than using a text editor to manually create the files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using QBlade to analyze the NACA 4412 airfoil. The agent must run three separate XFoil viscous analyses at Reynolds numbers 200,000, 500,000, and 1,000,000. For each analysis, the Angle of Attack (AoA) range must be set exactly from -5 to 15 degrees. The results must be exported as three text files: polar_re200k.txt, polar_re500k.txt, and polar_re1m.txt in the /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/ directory.
